title: Fatal auth failure auto-dismisses; UI left stuck in Connecting state
description: When bootstrap_session returns None (auth failure), client_task::run returns immediately after sending AppEvent::Error. The UI shows the error for 5 seconds via tick_error_timeout, then clears it. The status bar still shows Connecting. After 5 seconds the app appears to be silently waiting with no indication that auth failed and no background task is running. There is no terminal error state - the app is permanently dead but looks alive. Maintenance consequence: users file bugs saying the app is stuck; the 5-second auto-dismiss is designed for transient errors and is wrong for fatal non-retried failures.
